title: VOLUNTEER CAREGIVERS - 211info
text: VOLUNTEER CAREGIVERS VOLUNTEER CAREGIVERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Volunteers provide transportation to medical appointments and friendly visiting. Handyman chores, installing grab bars and other minor home repairs, some yard work, grocery and shopping assistance, and information and referrals are amongst services provided. Medical transportation can be provided to Albany, Corvallis, Eugene, Lebanon, Portland, Salem and Portland only to OHSU and Veterans Hospital. 930 SW Queen Avenue Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Age 55 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-12:30pm Voicemail available 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 928-2173 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 928-2173 Main phone Main phone (541) 928-2173 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment. Need at least 3 business days advance notice for transportation by car or a wheelchair van. Transportation is based on the availability of volunteers. FEES: None; donations accepted DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, some Spanish AREA SERVED: Greater Albany Public Schools (Cities of Albany, Crabtree, Lebanon, Millersburg, Sweet Home, and Tangent) SITE HOURS: TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Services: Friendly Outreach Programs Home Barrier Evaluation/Removal Services Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Services Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Older Adults If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. VOLUNTEER CAREGIVERS
